title: Concurrent reads
description: Given a database under concurrent read load, when N threads query simultaneously, all should return consistent results with no partial reads or crashes. Spec: features/concurrency/concurrent_reads.feature

comments.author: ryan.porter

comments.text: Status: closed (kbs does not accept 'done'). Done: implemented concurrent_reads steps in Rust+Python with locking and result assertions.
